name: Honey Nut Spice Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, brown sugar, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
2. In another bowl, combine honey, eggs, buttermilk, and melted butter. Stir until just combined.
3. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined.
4. Stir in the chopped walnuts.
5. Pour the batter into a greased bread pan.
6. Bake for 60 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Cool on a wire rack.
